meta.title: Trav's Agentic Hub
meta.tagline: Tools, skills, and frameworks for agentic AI engineering
meta.author: tjones-gss

projects.name: Mission Control
projects.description: Open-source governance cockpit for Claude Code agents. Live multi-project oversight, risk-typed approval gates, audit trail, fleet orchestration, and AFK webhooks.

projects.name: Adaptive Harness
projects.description: Control plane for AI coding agents. Mission scope, dangerous command blocking, quality gates, human approval, session memory. 8 pipeline modes.

projects.name: Auto-Improve
projects.description: AI judge loop mechanism — automated evaluation and improvement cycles for agent output quality.

projects.name: AI Doc
projects.description: Living Docusaurus documentation for how GSS engineering uses AI tools — Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, MCP servers, COBOL workflows.

tools.name: AI Usage Overlays
tools.description: Windows HUD overlays showing real-time Claude Code and Cursor usage stats.

tools.name: Prompt Enhance
tools.description: Prompt enhancer for Cursor IDE — refines and improves prompts before sending.

tools.name: Prompt Gen
tools.description: Prompt generation tool aimed at beginners learning to work with AI agents.

tools.name: Cursor Agent Workspace
tools.description: Cloud Cursor agent artifact drop zone — staging area for agent-produced work.

custom_skills.name: /overcheck
custom_skills.description: Reviews uncommitted diffs for overengineering — premature abstraction, speculative features, drive-by changes.

configs.name: Claude Agent Kit
configs.description: Forked agents/skills/hooks test area for Claude Code extensibility.

configs.name: Dotfiles
configs.description: Dev setup kit with Claude Code configs, shell settings, and tool preferences.

configs.name: LLM Docs MCP
configs.description: Personal LLM documentation MCP server + knowledge base.
